examples:
Command Example
#
!iam-disable-user user-profile=`{"email":"testdemisto2@paloaltonetworks.com"}`
Human Readable Output

Disable User Results (ServiceNow IAM)
#
brand

!iam-disable-user user-profile=`{"email":"testdemisto2@paloaltonetworks.com"}`
Human Readable Output

Disable User Results (ServiceNow IAM)

brand
instanceName
success

outputs.description: If true, the employee's status is active, otherwise false. IAM.Vendor.brand Name of the integration.
outputs.name: IAM.Vendor.active

outputs.description: Indicates if the API was successful or provides error information. IAM.Vendor.email The employee's email address.
outputs.name: IAM.Vendor.details

outputs.description: HTTP error response code. IAM.Vendor.errorMessage Reason why the API failed.
outputs.name: IAM.Vendor.errorCode

outputs.description: The employee's user ID in the app. IAM.Vendor.instanceName Name of the integration instance.
outputs.name: IAM.Vendor.id

outputs.description: If true, the command was executed successfully, otherwise false. IAM.Vendor.username The employee's username in the app.
outputs.name: IAM.Vendor.success
